340→                  value={sort}\n   341→                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n   342→                  className=\"input-field\"\n   343→                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n   344→                >\n   345→                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n   346→                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n   347→                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n   348→                </select>\n   349→              </div>\n   350→\n   351→              {hasActiveFilters && (\n   352→                <button\n   353→                  onClick={clearFilters}\n   354→                  style={{\n   355→                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n   356→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   357→                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n   358→                    fontWeight: 600,\n   359→                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n   360→                    background: \"none\",\n   361→                    border: \"none\",\n   362→                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n   363→                  }}\n   364→                >\n   365→                  Clear all\n   366→                </button>\n   367→              )}\n   368→            </div>\n   369→          </div>\n   370→        )}\n   371→      </div>\n   372→\n   373→      {/* Results */}\n   374→      {loading ? (\n   375→        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n   376→          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n   377→            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n   378→              <div\n   379→                className=\"skeleton\"\n   380→                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n   381→              />\n   382→              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n   383→                <div\n   384→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n   385→                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n   386→                />\n   387→                <div\n   388→                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n   389→                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n   390→                />\n   391→                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n   392→                  <div\n   393→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   394→                    style={{\n   395→                      width: \"5rem\",\n   396→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   397→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   398→                    }}\n   399→                  />\n   400→                  <div\n   401→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   402→                    style={{\n   403→                      width: \"4rem\",\n   404→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   405→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   406→                    }}\n   407→                  />\n   408→                  <div\n   409→                    className=\"skeleton\"\n   410→                    style={{\n   411→                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n   412→                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n   413→                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n   414→                    }}\n   415→                  />\n   416→                </div>\n   417→              </div>\n   418→            </div>\n   419→          ))}\n   420→        </div>\n   421→      ) : error ? (\n   422→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   423→          <svg\n   424→            width=\"40\"\n   425→            height=\"40\"\n   426→            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   427→            fill=\"none\"\n   428→            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n   429→            strokeWidth={1.5}\n   430→            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n   431→          >\n   432→            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n   433→            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n   434→            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n   435→          </svg>\n   436→          <p\n   437→            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   438→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   439→          >\n   440→            {error}\n   441→          </p>\n   442→          <button\n   443→            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n   444→            className=\"btn-primary\"\n   445→            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n   446→          >\n   447→            Try again\n   448→          </button>\n   449→        </div>\n   450→      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n   451→        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n   452→          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n   453→            <>\n   454→              <p\n   455→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   456→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   457→              >\n   458→                No matching reading groups\n   459→              </p>\n   460→              <p\n   461→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   462→                style={{\n   463→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   464→                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   465→                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n   466→                }}\n   467→              >\n   468→                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n   469→              </p>\n   470→              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n   471→                Clear filters\n   472→              </button>\n   473→            </>\n   474→          ) : (\n   475→            <>\n   476→              <p\n   477→                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n   478→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n   479→              >\n   480→                No reading groups yet\n   481→              </p>\n   482→              <p\n   483→                className=\"mb-6\"\n   484→                style={{\n   485→                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   486→ reading group and find your book\n   491→                companions.\n   492→              </p>\n   493→              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n   494→   className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n   503→            style={{\n   504→              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   505→              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   506→ ` · Page ${page} of ${totalPages}` : \"\"}\n   511→          </p>\n   512→          <div className=\"grid gap-4\" role=\"list\" aria-label=\"Reading groups\">\n   513→ hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n   518→                role=\"listitem\"\n   519→              >\n   520→                <BookCover\n   521→ */}\n   625→          {totalPages > 1 && (\n   626→            <nav\n   627→              className=\"flex justify-center items-center gap-2 mt-8\"\n   628→              aria-label=\"Pagination\"\n   629→              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   630→            >\n   631→              <button\n   632→                onClick={() => handlePageChange(page - 1)}\n   633→                disabled={page <= 1}\n   634→                className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   635→                style={{\n   636→                  fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n   637→                  padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\",\n   638→                  opacity: page <= 1 ? 0.5 : 1,\n   639→                  cursor: page <= 1 ? \"not-allowed\" : \"pointer\",\n   640→                }}\n   641→                aria-label=\"Previous page\"\n   642→              >\n   643→                Previous\n   644→              </button>\n   645→              <span\n   646→                className=\"text-sm\"\n   647→                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", padding: \"0 0.5rem\" }}\n   648→              >\n   649→                {page} / {totalPages}\n   650→              </span>\n   651→              <button\n   652→                onClick={() => handlePageChange(page + 1)}\n   653→                disabled={page >= totalPages}\n   654→                className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   655→                style={{\n   656→                  fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n   657→                  padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\",\n   658→                  opacity: page >= totalPages ? 0.5 : 1,\n   659→                  cursor: page >= totalPages ? \"not-allowed\" : \"pointer\",\n   660→                }}\n   661→                aria-label=\"Next page\"\n   662→              >\n   663→ 672→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bbf58929-c3f8-4e2d-8641-5abb9b9479a7","uuid":"a9f19f0a-3688-4c88-8c0d-eb8b0307b7cf","timestamp":"2026-03-24T08:03:54.066Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/page.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // Pagination state\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);\n  const [totalResults, setTotalResults] = useState(0);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n      // Abort any in-flight request to prevent stale responses overwriting newer ones\n      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n      const controller = new AbortController();\n      abortRef.current = controller;\n\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`, { signal: controller.signal })\n        .then((r) => {\n          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n          return r.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          if (controller.signal.aborted) return;\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          if (data.pagination) {\n            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n          }\n          setError(null);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch((err) => {\n          if ((err as Error).name === \"AbortError\") return;\n          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n          setLoading(false);\n        });\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n    setReadingPace(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n    setStartDateFrom(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) => {\n    setPage(newPage);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, newPage);\n    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setReadingPace(\"\");\n    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            id=\"filter-panel\"\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Reading pace\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={readingPace}\n                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Starting from\n                </label>\n                <input\n                  type=\"date\"\n                  value={startDateFrom}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                />\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n              <div\n                className=\"skeleton\"\n                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              />\n              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"4rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      ) : error ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          <svg\n            width=\"40\"\n            height=\"40\"\n            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            fill=\"none\"\n            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n            strokeWidth={1.5}\n            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n          </svg>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {error}\n          </p>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\n            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            Try again\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {totalResults} open group{totalResults !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n            {totalPages > 1 ? ` · Page ${page} of ${totalPages}` : \"\"}\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4\" role=\"list\" aria-label=\"Reading groups\">\n            {listings.map((listing) => (\n              <Link\n                key={listing.id}\n                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n                role=\"listitem\"\n              >\n                <BookCover\n                  src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                  alt={listing.book_title}\n                  width={64}\n                  height={96}\n                  className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                  style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                />\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n                  </p>\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                  >\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Starts{\" \"}\n                      {new Date(listing.start_date + \"T00:00:00\").toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n                    </span>\n                    {listing.requires_approval ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        Approval required\n                      </span>\n                    ) : null}\n                    {listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"#5865F2\",\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.25rem\",\n             </div>\n                </div>\n              </Link>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Pagination controls */}\n          {totalPages > 1 && (\n            <nav\n              className=\"flex justify-center items-center gap-2 mt-8\"\n              aria-label=\"Pagination\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <button\n                onClick={() => handlePageChange(page - 1)}\n                disabled={page <= 1}\n                className=\"btn-secondary\"\n                style={{\n                  fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                  padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\",\n                  opacity: page <= 1 ? 0.5 : 1,\n                  cursor: page <= 1 ? \"not-allowed\" : \"pointer\",\n                }}\n                aria-label=\"Previous page\"\n              >\n                Previous\n              </button>\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", padding: \"0 0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                {page} / {totalPages}\n              </span>\n              <button\n                onClick={() => handlePageChange(page + 1)}\n                disabled={page >= totalPages}\n                className=\"btn-secondary\"\n                style={{\n                  fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                  padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\",\n                  opacity: page >= totalPages ? 0.5 : 1,\n                  cursor: page >= totalPages ? \"not-allowed\" : \"pointer\",\n                }}\n                aria-label=\"Next page\"\n              >\n                Next\n              </button>\n            </nav>\n          )}\n        </>\n      )}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","numLines":672,"startLine":1,"totalLines":672}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CwL4Z3ytD2mqdx3QghbsJg","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→export async function POST(\n     7→  _req: NextRequest,\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     9→) {\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    11→  if (!session) {\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    13→  }\n    14→\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  const listing = db\n    22→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    24→\n    25→  if (!listing) {\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    27→  }\n    28→\n    29→  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n    30→  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    35→    return NextResponse.json(\n    36→      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n    37→      { status: 400 }\n    38→    );\n    39→  }\n    40→\n    41→  if (listing.is_full) {\n    42→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n    43→  }\n    44→\n    45→  // Check if already a member\n    46→  const existing = db\n    47→    .prepare(\n    48→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    49→    )\n    50→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    51→\n    52→  if (existing) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n    57→  const pendingApp = db\n    58→    .prepare(\n    59→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    60→    )\n    61→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    62→\n    63→  if (pendingApp) {\n    64→    return NextResponse.json(\n    65→      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n    66→      { status: 400 }\n    67→    );\n    68→  }\n    69→\n    70→  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n    71→  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n    72→  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    73→    const freshListing = db\n    74→      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    75→      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n    76→\n    77→    if (!freshListing) {\n    78→      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };\n    79→    }\n    80→\n    81→    const { count } = db\n    82→      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    83→      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n    84→\n    85→    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    86→      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    87→    }\n    88→\n    89→    db.prepare(\n    90→      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    91→    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n    92→\n    93→    const newCount = count + 1;\n    94→    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n    95→      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    96→    }\n    97→\n    98→    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    99→  });\n   100→\n   101→  const result = joinTransaction();\n   102→\n   103→  if (result.error) {\n   104→    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n   105→  }\n   106→\n   107→  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n   108→  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n   109→\n   110→  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n   111→    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n   112→  }\n   113→\n   114→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n   115→}\n   116→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bbf58929-c3f8-4e2d-8641-5abb9b9479a7","uuid":"b3728fb5-b0f2-4784-9364-529020652f82","timestamp":"2026-03-24T08:03:54.231Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/join/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyListingAuthor, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  // Author is already a member — don't allow re-joining\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are the organizer of this group\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group requires approval. Please apply instead.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if already a member\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (existing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"You are already a member\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Check if user has a pending application (e.g., requires_approval was toggled off)\n  const pendingApp = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (pendingApp) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You already have a pending application for this group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Wrap count check + insert in a transaction to prevent race conditions\n  // Re-read max_group_size inside the transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n  const joinTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    const freshListing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (!freshListing) {\n      return { error: \"Listing not found\", count: 0, maxSize: 0 };\n    }\n\n    const { count } = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n    if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", count, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n    }\n\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    const newCount = count + 1;\n    if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n      db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n    }\n\n    return { error: null, count: newCount, maxSize: freshListing.max_group_size };\n  });\n\n  const result = joinTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside the transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyListingAuthor(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  if (result.count === result.maxSize) {\n    notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true, memberCount: result.count });\n}\n","numLines":116,"startLine":1,"totalLines":116}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01G9PGMpEB8gTDmqLsP6hmk9","type":"tool_result","content":"   120→\n   121→export function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n   122→  const listing = db\n   123→    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n   124→    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n   125→  // Include all members (including the author) — author needs to know group is full to create the chat\n   126→  const members = db\n   127→    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n   128→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n   129→\n   130→  if (listing) {\n   131→    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n   132→    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n   133→      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n   134→      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n   135→    const message = botConfigured\n   136→      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n   137→      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n   138→\n   139→    for (const member of members) {\n   140→      createNotification(\n   141→        member.user_id,\n   142→        listingId,\n   143→        \"group_full\",\n   144→        message\n   145→      );\n   146→    }\n   147→  }\n   148→}\n   149→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bbf58929-c3f8-4e2d-8641-5abb9b9479a7","uuid":"10aa7f25-6c25-4c91-9213-46beacff6152","timestamp":"2026-03-24T08:03:57.679Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/lib/notifications.ts","content":"\nexport function notifyGroupFull(listingId: number) {\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT book_title, platform_preference, author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { book_title: string; platform_preference: string; author_id: number } | undefined;\n  // Include all members (including the author) — author needs to know group is full to create the chat\n  const members = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\n\n  if (listing) {\n    const platform = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? \"Discord\" : \"Telegram\";\n    const botConfigured = listing.platform_preference === \"discord\"\n      ? !!process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN\n      : !!process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;\n    const message = botConfigured\n      ? `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The ${platform} group will be set up automatically.`\n      : `The reading group for \"${listing.book_title}\" is now full! The organizer will share a ${platform} link soon.`;\n\n    for (const member of members) {\n      createNotification(\n        member.user_id,\n        listingId,\n        \"group_full\",\n        message\n      );\n    }\n  }\n}\n","numLines":30,"startLine":120,"totalLines":149}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01NvBqJHH4YR2sTLwqLNNGG6","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_014xaWPRNaFym1tDmPJVaUpy","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","old_string":"  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014xaWPRNaFym1tDmPJVaUpy","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"bbf58929-c3f8-4e2d-8641-5abb9b9479a7","uuid":"21a6086d-e2c0-4a72-a6ae-9b559269197b","timestamp":"2026-03-24T08:04:10.595Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","oldString":"  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {","newString":"  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Re-read max_group_size inside transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n      const freshListing = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n\n      if (!freshListing) {\n        throw new Error(\"Listing not found\");\n      }\n\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n\n        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n        rejectedApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n        }\n\n        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":59,"oldLines":12,"newStart":59,"newLines":21,"lines":["   if (action === \"approve\") {","     // Use transaction to ensure atomicity","     const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {","+      // Re-read max_group_size inside transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH","+      const freshListing = db","+        .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")","+        .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;","+","+      if (!freshListing) {","+        throw new Error(\"Listing not found\");","+      }","+","       // Check if group is already full","       const { count } = db","         .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")","         .get(listingId) as { count: number };"," ","-      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {","+      if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {","         throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");","       }"," "]},{"oldStart":81,"oldLines":7,"newStart":90,"newLines":7,"lines":["       // Check if group is now full","       const newCount = count + 1;","       let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];","-      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {","+      if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {","         db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);"," ","         // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

 // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  }, [fetchListings]);","newString":"  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Cleanup debounce timer and in-flight request on unmount\n  useEffect(() => {\n    return () => {\n      if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    };\n  }, []);","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  member_count: number;\n  author_name: string;\n  created_at: string;\n}\n\nexport default function HomePage() {\n  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n\n  // Search & filter state\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n\n  // Pagination state\n  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);\n  const [totalResults, setTotalResults] = useState(0);\n\n  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n\n  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n      // Abort any in-flight request to prevent stale responses overwriting newer ones\n      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n      const controller = new AbortController();\n      abortRef.current = controller;\n\n      setLoading(true);\n      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n\n      const qs = params.toString();\n      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`, { signal: controller.signal })\n        .then((r) => {\n          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n          return r.json();\n        })\n        .then((data) => {\n          if (controller.signal.aborted) return;\n          setListings(data.listings || []);\n          if (data.pagination) {\n            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n          }\n          setError(null);\n          setLoading(false);\n        })\n        .catch((err) => {\n          if ((err as Error).name === \"AbortError\") return;\n          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n          setLoading(false);\n        });\n    },\n    []\n  );\n\n  // Initial fetch\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  }, [fetchListings]);\n\n  // Debounced search\n  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSearchQuery(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n    }, 400);\n  };\n\n  // Immediate filter changes\n  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n    setMeetingFormat(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n    setReadingPace(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n    setStartDateFrom(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n    setSort(value);\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n  };\n\n  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) => {\n    setPage(newPage);\n    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, newPage);\n    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n  };\n\n  const clearFilters = () => {\n    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n    setReadingPace(\"\");\n    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n    setSort(\"newest\");\n    setPage(1);\n    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n  };\n\n  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div>\n      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n          Find your reading companion\n        </h1>\n        <p\n          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n          style={{\n            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n          connect on Telegram to read together.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n            <input\n              type=\"text\"\n              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n              value={searchQuery}\n              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n              className=\"input-field\"\n              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n            />\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              style={{\n                position: \"absolute\",\n                left: \"0.75rem\",\n                top: \"50%\",\n                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                width: \"1.125rem\",\n                height: \"1.125rem\",\n                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n              }}\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            >\n              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n            </svg>\n          </div>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n            style={{\n              display: \"flex\",\n              alignItems: \"center\",\n              gap: \"0.375rem\",\n              whiteSpace: \"nowrap\",\n              position: \"relative\",\n            }}\n          >\n            <svg\n              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n              width=\"16\"\n              height=\"16\"\n              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n              fill=\"none\"\n              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n              strokeWidth={2}\n            >\n              <line x1={4} y1={6} x2={20} y2={6} />\n              <line x1={7} y1={12} x2={17} y2={12} />\n              <line x1={10} y1={18} x2={14} y2={18} />\n            </svg>\n            Filters\n            {hasActiveFilters && (\n              <span\n                aria-hidden=\"true\"\n                style={{\n                  width: \"0.5rem\",\n                  height: \"0.5rem\",\n                  borderRadius: \"50%\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                  position: \"absolute\",\n                  top: \"0.375rem\",\n                  right: \"0.375rem\",\n                }}\n              />\n            )}\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Filter panel */}\n        {filtersOpen && (\n          <div\n            id=\"filter-panel\"\n            className=\"card mt-3\"\n            style={{ padding: \"1rem 1.25rem\" }}\n          >\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-3 sm:gap-4 items-end\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Meeting format\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={meetingFormat}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleFormatChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All formats</option>\n                  <option value=\"voice\">Voice calls</option>\n                  <option value=\"text\">Text chat</option>\n                  <option value=\"mixed\">Mixed</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Reading pace\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={readingPace}\n                  onChange={(e) => handlePaceChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">All paces</option>\n                  <option value=\"chapter\">Chapter-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"pages\">Pages-based</option>\n                  <option value=\"week\">Weekly</option>\n                  <option value=\"day\">Daily</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Starting from\n                </label>\n                <input\n                  type=\"date\"\n                  value={startDateFrom}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleStartDateFromChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                />\n              </div>\n\n              <div>\n                <label\n                  className=\"text-xs font-semibold mb-1 block\"\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    textTransform: \"uppercase\",\n                    letterSpacing: \"0.05em\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Sort by\n                </label>\n                <select\n                  value={sort}\n                  onChange={(e) => handleSortChange(e.target.value)}\n                  className=\"input-field\"\n                  style={{ fontSize: \"0.875rem\", padding: \"0.5rem 0.75rem\" }}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"newest\">Newest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"oldest\">Oldest first</option>\n                  <option value=\"start_date\">Start date (soonest)</option>\n                </select>\n              </div>\n\n              {hasActiveFilters && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={clearFilters}\n                  style={{\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                    fontWeight: 600,\n                    cursor: \"pointer\",\n                    background: \"none\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                    padding: \"0.5rem 0\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Clear all\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Results */}\n      {loading ? (\n        <div className=\"grid gap-4\">\n          {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (\n            <div key={i} className=\"card flex gap-4\">\n              <div\n                className=\"skeleton\"\n                style={{ width: \"4rem\", height: \"6rem\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              />\n              <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-heading\"\n                  style={{ width: `${60 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div\n                  className=\"skeleton skeleton-text\"\n                  style={{ width: `${45 - i * 5}%` }}\n                />\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2 mt-2\">\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"4rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                  <div\n                    className=\"skeleton\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: \"5.5rem\",\n                      height: \"1.5rem\",\n                      borderRadius: \"9999px\",\n                    }}\n                  />\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      ) : error ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          <svg\n            width=\"40\"\n            height=\"40\"\n            viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n            fill=\"none\"\n            stroke=\"var(--color-error)\"\n            strokeWidth={1.5}\n            style={{ margin: \"0 auto 0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            <circle cx={12} cy={12} r={10} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={8} x2={12} y2={12} />\n            <line x1={12} y1={16} x2={12.01} y2={16} />\n          </svg>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n            style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n          >\n            {error}\n          </p>\n          <button\n            onClick={() => fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom)}\n            className=\"btn-primary\"\n            style={{ marginTop: \"0.75rem\" }}\n          >\n            Try again\n          </button>\n        </div>\n      ) : listings.length === 0 ? (\n        <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n          {hasActiveFilters ? (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No matching reading groups\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Try adjusting your search or filters to find more groups.\n              </p>\n              <button onClick={clearFilters} className=\"btn-secondary\">\n                Clear filters\n              </button>\n            </>\n          ) : (\n            <>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-lg mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                No reading groups yet\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"mb-6\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  fontSize: \"0.95rem\",\n                }}\n              >\n                Be the first to create a reading group and find your book\n                companions.\n              </p>\n              <Link href=\"/listings/create\" className=\"btn-primary\">\n                Create the first listing\n              </Link>\n            </>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      ) : (\n        <>\n          <p\n            className=\"mb-3 text-sm\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            {totalResults} open group{totalResults !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}\n            {hasActiveFilters ? \" found\" : \"\"}\n            {totalPages > 1 ? ` · Page ${page} of ${totalPages}` : \"\"}\n          </p>\n          <div className=\"grid gap-4\" role=\"list\" aria-label=\"Reading groups\">\n            {listings.map((listing) => (\n              <Link\n                key={listing.id}\n                href={`/listings/${listing.id}`}\n                className=\"card hover:shadow-md transition-shadow flex gap-4\"\n                role=\"listitem\"\n              >\n                <BookCover\n                  src={listing.book_cover_url}\n                  alt={listing.book_title}\n                  width={64}\n                  height={96}\n                  className=\"w-16 h-24 object-cover rounded\"\n                  style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n                />\n\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <h3 className=\"text-lg font-bold truncate\">\n                    {listing.book_title}\n                  </h3>\n                  <p\n                    className=\"text-sm mb-2 truncate\"\n                    style={{\n                      color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    by {listing.book_author} · posted by {listing.author_name}\n                  </p>\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2\"\n                    style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                  >\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.reading_pace}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Starts{\" \"}\n                      {new Date(listing.start_date + \"T00:00:00\").toLocaleDateString(\n                        \"en-US\",\n                        {\n                          month: \"short\",\n                          day: \"numeric\",\n                        }\n                      )}\n                    </span>\n                    <span\n                      className=\"badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      {listing.member_count}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n                    </span>\n                    {listing.requires_approval ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        Approval required\n                      </span>\n                    ) : null}\n                    {listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" ? (\n                      <span\n                        className=\"badge\"\n                        style={{\n                          backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.08)\",\n                          color: \"#5865F2\",\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.25rem\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"10\" height=\"10\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913             </div>\n                </div>\n              </Link>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Pagination controls */}\n          {totalPages > 1 && (\n            <nav\n              className=\"flex justify-center items-center gap-2 mt-8\"\n              aria-label=\"Pagination\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <button\n                onClick={() => handlePageChange(page - 1)}\n                disabled={page <= 1}\n                className=\"btn-secondary\"\n                style={{\n                  fontSize: \"0.875rem\",\n                  padding: \"0.5rem 1rem\",\n                  opacity: page <= 1 ? 0.5 : 1,\n                  cursor: page <= 1 ? \"not-allowed\" : \"pointer\",\n                }}\n                aria-label=\"Previous page\"\n              >\n                Previous\n              </button>\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm\"\n
